roles.name: implementer
roles.mandate: produce the diff against the DoD

roles.name: reviewer
roles.mandate: fresh-context adversarial review of the diff vs criteria only

roles.name: security
roles.mandate: check permissions, secrets, deps, blast radius

roles.name: docs
roles.mandate: update docs/memory to match the change

shared_state: an external markdown file or Linear board holding what's done and what's next, outside any single conversation
